goal: Match detail, stadiums, and games hub fully functional
summary: Phase 5 complete. Match detail: removed VibeMeter placeholder, MomentumChart uses real match_events, ScheduleTab timezone-safe, ScoreCard possession conditional. Stadiums: review relies on DB generated column, query invalidation on submit, fetchPriority lowered, image warming guarded, fetchStadiumBySlug renamed. Games hub: BracketTab wired, Trivia localStorage persistence, FanDuel accept/reject, Oracle onConflict dedup, MiniLeague bounded.
stepSummaries:
1. Fix match detail placeholders and schedule timezone [verified]
  2. Fix stadium review submission and avg ratings [verified]
  3. Fix games hub: bracket wiring, trivia persistence, duel accept/reject, oracle dedup [verified]
